name: fathom
description: Scenario-blind tool-effectiveness evals. Run a coding tool, skill, model tier, or execution strategy through a task-bank matrix, score the results blind to which arm produced them, and join quality with economy (tokens, turns, USD) into a longitudinal scorecard. The engine and its committed longitudinal ledger live in your own fathom checkout; point FATHOM_HOME at it. Requires uv and a local fathom repository.
